title: Master v0.2.3 Auto Cleanup Update Folder
notes:
Adds an optional cleanup checkbox so Master can delete/recycle the selected update folder after a successful Build + Auto Publish.

Changes:
- Adds "Delete update folder after successful Build + Auto Publish" checkbox.
- Cleanup only runs after Auto Publish succeeds.
- If build or upload fails, the folder is kept.
- Sends the selected update folder to the Recycle Bin when possible.
- Safety checks prevent deleting folders outside Desktop/Documents.
- Safety checks require the folder name to look like an Anime Power League Helper update folder.
- Keeps Build From Update Folder from v0.2.2.
- Keeps Paste Update Info Autofill.
